text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yawn... It's a day off today. I guess I'll do some shopping.

text_block_list.name: News Anchor
text_block_list.text:
In today's horoscope... the third luckiest is Aries!
It looks like today will be an extra lucky day for
you folks!

text_block_list.name: Checkout Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Aren't you lucky?! You won big on the receipt
raffle!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Did you just say I won big?! ...Could that mean...
first priz—

text_block_list.name: Checkout Lady
text_block_list.text: Third-prize! No one has won this yet!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
C-come on, Nature, look on the bright side. The
third-place prize is probably still pretty fancy,
right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Haha... hahaha... I guess I shouldn't have got my
hopes up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sinking her shoulders in disappointment, Nice
Nature wonders what to do with such an
abundance of scourers.
